title: Charred Croatian Gobo Burdock Skewers
description: A light and crowd-pleasing Croatian dish featuring charred gobo burdock, perfect for a snack or dinner party. This anti-inflammatory friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika.
Add the gobo burdock pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated gobo burdock pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the gobo burdock is charred and tender.
Brush the skewers with lemon juice during the last minute of grilling.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the charred gobo burdock skewers hot, garnished with fresh parsley or dill if desired.
